summary: Add card count badge to each column header
description: Each column header (To Do, Doing, Done) should display the number of cards currently in that column, shown as a small badge next to the title. For example: 'To Do (2)'. The count must update based on the cards rendered from cards.json.
acceptance_criteria: Each of the three column headers displays a count in parentheses after its name
The count reflects the actual number of cards in that column
No changes to cards.json structure are required
